# Support

## Getting Help

We're here to help! Here are the best ways to get support:

### 📚 Documentation

- **Getting Started**: See the [README.md](../README.md) Quick Start section
- **Configuration Guide**: [docs/configuration.md](../docs/configuration.md)
- **CLI Reference**: [docs/cli.md](../docs/cli.md)
- **Preset System**: [docs/presets.md](../docs/presets.md)
- **Architecture**: [ARCHITECTURE.md](../ARCHITECTURE.md)

### 🐛 Bug Reports

Found a bug? Please open an issue using the [bug report template](.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug_report.md).

**Before reporting:**

- Check existing issues to see if it's already reported
- Include steps to reproduce
- Include your environment (OS, Node version, agentsync version)
- Include relevant logs or error messages

### 💡 Feature Requests

Have an idea for a new feature? Open an issue using the [feature request template](.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/feature_request.md).

### ❓ Questions

- **GitHub Discussions**: Use [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/baranovxyz/agentsync/discussions) for questions and general discussion
- **Issues**: For specific problems or bugs, use [Issues](https://github.com/baranovxyz/agentsync/issues)

### 🔒 Security Issues

**Please do not open public issues for security vulnerabilities.**

Report security issues privately via [GitHub Security Advisories](https://github.com/baranovxyz/agentsync/security/advisories/new).

See [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) for more information.

## Response Times

We aim to respond to:

- **Security issues**: Within 48 hours
- **Bug reports**: Within 1 week
- **Feature requests**: Within 2 weeks (may be longer for complex requests)
- **Questions**: Within a few days

## Contributing

Want to help improve AgentSync? See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) for guidelines.

## Community

- **Code of Conduct**: Please read our [Code of Conduct](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)
- **Contributing**: See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) for how to contribute

---

**Note**: AgentSync is in active development (alpha). Some features may change. We appreciate your patience and feedback!
